title.en: Ye Tian began to search for traces of the True ...

content.en:
"This is the area!"

Ye Tian began to search for traces of the True Dragon Worm Mother in this area.

After a while, a Heavenly Ancestor came here.

"Golden Light Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian greeted.

The Golden Light Heavenly Ancestor asked, "Endless Great Ancestor, are you sure that the True Dragon Worm Mother is in this area?"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "Golden Light Heavenly Ancestor, I used a special method to determine that the other party was in this area, but I could only determine the approximate range, and I couldn't be accurate to which location. However, there is no other way at the moment, but to look for it first. "

"That's right!"

Jin Guang Tianzu thought about it carefully, and decided to look for it in this area, in case he found it!

Immediately, he also began to search for the True Dragon Worm Mother in this area.

This area covers a vast area, containing ten realms, thousands of special treasure lands, as well as dangerous areas, and countless nests of immeasurable ruin monsters.

Therefore, even if it is a Heavenly Ancestor, it is very troublesome to search for this area.

Not long after, more than a dozen Heavenly Ancestors came.

Although they didn't quite believe in the results of Ye Tian's performance, they had no choice but to look for a wave here first.

Time passes slowly.

With these Heavenly Ancestors looking for the True Dragon Worm Mother here, its movements are not small.

And Wutong Heavenly Ancestor didn't do nothing, he had already arranged a lot of secret monitoring small magic circles in this area.

These small monitoring circles are common in many realms, and many forces like to arrange them, and no one knows who arranged them without their own imprints.

Through these monitoring small magic circles, he knew that there were many Heavenly Ancestors who were here to find traces of the True Dragon Worm.

"Sure enough, the approximate location was still exposed!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said helplessly.

It was the last thing he wanted to see, but it happened.

He didn't choose to flee immediately, but was still waiting slowly, if these Heavenly Ancestors looked for a while and left, he still had hope.

However.

As the years passed, these Heavenly Ancestors were still searching.

At this rate, there is a real chance that he will be found.

"We must find a way to get out of this area!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said secretly.

Of course.

There were now more than a dozen Heavenly Ancestors in this area, and if he fled now, he would not be able to hide his aura, even if he was far away, he would still be able to be discovered by them.

Therefore, he wanted to lure these Heavenly Ancestors away.

Thinking about it, there seems to be only one way.

"True Dragon Worm Mother, give your True Dragon Worm an order to let them gather and occupy a large Infinite Ruined Monster Lair, preferably a more secret nest, and then create a nest that is inadvertently discovered by a Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, and then guide the other party to the other party, so that the other party mistakenly thinks that it is where the True Dragon Worm Mother's lair is. Remember, you have to kill that Great Ancestor later. Wutong Heavenly Ancestor ordered.

In this way, those Heavenly Ancestors would mistakenly think that the True Dragon Worm Mother had been discovered, and they would definitely rush over as soon as possible, for fear that the True Dragon Worm Mother would escape.

And at that time, it was a good time for him to escape.

......

Immeasurable Ruins.

A relatively hidden nest of large immeasurable ruin monsters, batch after batch of true dragon insects came here, killed all the immeasurable ruin monsters in an instant, and successfully occupied this place.

Immediately, several true dragon insects began to wander around the surrounding area.

As time passed, finally on this day, these real dragon insects were tracked.

"Six Fifth Stage Great Ancestors!"

This is not what the true dragon worm perceives, but the true dragon worm mother strengthens the perception of these true dragon worms, and peeks around from the perspective of the true dragon worm mother.

It's just that by doing so, it is easy to expose the existence of the true dragon worm mother.

But now he can't care so much, he has to find a way to lure those Heavenly Ancestors away.

Subsequently, under the order of the true dragon insect mother, these real dragon insects began to move towards the nest, deliberately making many circles during this period, and then rushed to the inside of the nest.

Far away from the nest, the six fifth-stage great ancestors saw that nest, and there were even some true dragon insects coming in and out, and there were quite a few of them.

Suddenly, an idea arose in their minds.

"I'll go! This can't be where the real dragon worm mother is, right?"

A fifth-stage Great Ancestor thought to himself.

Several Great Ancestors glanced at each other and prepared to leave.

However, a true dragon worm comparable to the fifth stage of the invincible level appeared.

"Not good!"

These fifth-stage great ancestors trembled all over, and they knew that they had been discovered.

Their strength is also at the peak of the fifth stage Great Ancestor, such strength is already very strong in the fifth stage, but compared with the invincible level fifth stage combat power, there is a big gap.

Puff puff puff!!

This invincible-level fifth-stage true dragon insect slashed these great ancestors one by one with extreme speed.

But before they died, these fifth-stage great ancestors still passed on the news.

......

"Suspected of being the nest of a true dragon worm mother!"

After the Golden Light Heavenly Ancestor got the news, they rushed directly to that place.

As for this, give up the search for now.

Whew!!!

One Heavenly Ancestor after another left.

Ye Tian also received the news, but he didn't leave here, he felt that the True Dragon Worm Mother was still in this area.

At this time.

After Wutong Heavenly Ancestor knew that his plan was almost successful, he began to prepare to escape.

"Let's go!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor took away the True Dragon Insect Mother and quickly escaped.

His speed was very fast, and the aura he emitted fluctuated too much to hide.

But as long as there is no Heavenly Ancestor in this area, it doesn't matter, even if you pass by some Great Ancestors, what if you sense his existence, you dare to intercept it?

Distance.

Ye Tian passed through the layers of void and sensed the aura of a Heavenly Ancestor fleeing at great speed.

"The breath of the Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor!"

He was no stranger to this breath, after all, he had seen Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

At this moment, the speed at which the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor fled was very fast, and it was a little far away from him.

"Chase!"

Ye Tian erupted at the fastest speed to pursue the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

He could sense the breath of the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor could naturally sense the breath of Ye Tian's explosion.

This kind of boundary-breaking level aura is too conspicuous, and Wutong Heavenly Ancestor can't even notice it.

"The breath of the Boundary-Breaking Rank is the newly promoted Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, the Endless Great Ancestor!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said secretly.

He didn't expect that the other Heavenly Ancestors were gone, and Ye Tian would still stay here.

The key is that Ye Tian's speed is still very fast, and he can't get rid of Ye Tian a little.

"He must be killed!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said secretly.

The other Heavenly Ancestors were led away, there should be no other Heavenly Ancestors in this area now, even if Ye Tian sent the message, it would take time for the other Heavenly Ancestors to rush over.

Therefore, as long as he kills Ye Tian in a short time, he still has hope of escaping.

Of course, there was just hope, after all, other Heavenly Ancestors could look for him from all other directions, and in whichever direction he fled, he might run into Heavenly Ancestors.

However, if you don't kill Ye Tian, there is no hope at all.

"Big deal, I'll flee to the territorial waters!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor gritted his teeth and said.
